articles.author: Josh Boak
articles.title: Trump says he'll place 25% tariff on autos from the EU, accusing it of not complying with trade deal - AP News
articles.description: The head of the European Parliament trade committee calls President Donald Trump’s tariff hike on European Union automobiles “unacceptable.” Committee Chair Bernd Lange says the Trump administration “keeps breaking its commitments,” including on import taxes …
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) President Donald Trump said on Friday that he will increase the tariffs charged on cars and trucks from the European Union next week to 25%, a move that could jolt the world economy a… [+5545 chars]
